instruction: What is the assertion consumer service url?
input:
urn:auth0:{YOUR-TENANT-NAME}:{YOUR-SAML-CONNECTION-
NAME}If your tenant name is foo  and your SAML connection name is 
saml-connection  , your Entity ID will be urn:auth0:foo:saml-
connection  . •The Assertion Consumer Service URL , which is the URL on the Service 
Provider that receives the SAML assertion from the IdP tenant, as you 
already may know. It has the form

Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)39
https://{YOUR-SP-DOMAIN}/login/
callback?connection={YOUR-SAML-CONNECTION-NAME}.
output: The Assertion Consumer Service URL, which is the URL on the Service Provider that receives the SAML assertion from the IdP tenant.

connection  . •The Assertion Consumer Service URL , which is the URL on the Service 
Provider that receives the SAML assertion from the IdP tenant, as you 
already may know. It has the form

Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)39
https://{YOUR-SP-DOMAIN}/login/
callback?connection={YOUR-SAML-CONNECTION-NAME}.
output: If your tenant name is foo and your SAML connection name is saml-connection, your Entity ID will be urn:auth0:foo:saml-connection.

red sample application 
from the  Quickstart  tab of the application configuration page. Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)43

input:
red sample application 
from the  Quickstart  tab of the application configuration page. Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)43

instruction: Where do i find the login link on my application page?
input:
red sample application 
from the  Quickstart  tab of the application configuration page. Choose your preferred technology and follow the instructions to download 
and get the application ready to run. Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)43
For this guide, we will download the Node.js  web application. Once you get 
the sample application, go to its folder and run the following commands:
npm install
npm start
Then, point your browser to http://localhost:3000/  and you should 
see the following page:
Once you click the Login link, you are redirected to the Service Provider 
tenant that shows you the login button you configured for the SAML 
connection:
output: Once you click the Login link, you are redirected to the Service Provider tenant that shows you the login button

instruction: How do i access the advanced settings section in asana?
input:
configure your Asana 
instance as a Service Provider. You should see two URLs similar to the ones shown below:Whitepaper Auth0’s guide to Single Sign-On (SSO)32
Take note of these URLs — you will need them to configure your Asana 
instance. Now go to the top of the page and select the Addons  tab of the Asana 
application configuration page. In the popup window that appears, select the Settings  tab:
output: You can find it at the top of the page, under the Addons tab or directly by going to the relevant configuration page.
